# Sentinel API

Sentinel API is an AI-powered Neural Defense Grid for APIs. It intercepts XSS, SQL Injection, SSRF, and other threats in real-time with an average latency of 21ms.

## Product Description

Sentinel API provides zero-configuration API security through a single HTTP header. Our edge-optimized architecture analyzes headers, SSL/TLS configurations, and payloads using AI behavioral patterns that block zero-day attacks without requiring signatures.

The platform offers a Security Score from 0-100 with actionable recommendations, detailed forensics reports, and multi-tenant isolation for Enterprise customers.

## Links

- Documentation: https://sentinel-ai.one/docs
- Pricing: https://sentinel-ai.one#pricing
- GitHub: https://github.com/phatonpain/sentinel-landing
- Live Demo: https://sentinel-landing-production.up.railway.app
- API Base URL: https://api-proxy-production-28ff.up.railway.app

## Main API Endpoints

- `POST /v1/inspect` — Analyze a request for threats and vulnerabilities
- `POST /v1/decide` — Real-time allow/block decision with risk scoring
- `GET /v1/health` — Service health check
- `GET /v1/stats` — Usage statistics and metrics

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- GSAP + Lenis (smooth scroll)
- Canvas 2D (neural grid visualization)
- NestJS (API backend)
- PostgreSQL + Redis
- Railway (deployment)
